sandbox_context: Public Sandbox experiment record; no Sandbox code was executed by the provenance gate.
claim: The declared experiment produces the documented output under the declared conditions.
falsifier: A clean reproduction fails to produce the documented output.

tests_run.details: Fixture output matched the declared example.

test_results: The bounded fixture reproduction matched the declared output.
known_failures: No independent reproduction has been completed.
known_unknowns: Security and deployment suitability remain unknown.
non_claims: This does not establish safety, correctness, usefulness, independence, or Lab authority.

adversarial_review.summary: Builder and breaker reviewed the bounded fixture.
limitations: The reviewers share one operator account.

rights_and_licences.source_licence: MIT as declared by the source repository.
rights_and_licences.files_modified: The proposed Lab file is independently reimplemented.
rights_and_licences.submitter_rights: Submitter declares the right to propose the reimplementation.
rights_and_licences.lab_mit_compatibility: Declared compatible; legal ownership is not verified by this gate.

security_and_privacy_impact.summary: No Lab write or external-posting path is part of the package.
security_and_privacy_impact.secrets_checked: Declared secret scan found no secrets.
security_and_privacy_impact.personal_data_checked: Declared review found no personal data.
security_and_privacy_impact.external_systems: No external system is contacted by the gate.
security_and_privacy_impact.risks: The source claim may be wrong or unsafe despite passing declared tests.

operator_decision_requested.rationale: Request another bounded review before any Lab proposal.
operator_decision_requested.stop_conditions: Stop if provenance, rights, or declared scope changes.
